description_long: This is a pair of tall, light tan boots made from what appears to be a soft, natural leather or suede material. The boots are unadorned, with a simple cylindrical shaft that rises to mid-calf height and a rounded toe. The surface shows subtle creases and natural texture, suggesting a supple and flexible construction. The soles are slightly visible and appear to be a different, slightly reddish-brown material, possibly leather or a thin rubber. There are no visible fasteners, laces, or decorative elements, giving the boots a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The interior is visible from the top, showing a similar material and color as the exterior.
description: A pair of tall, light tan leather boots with a simple, unadorned design and rounded toes. The boots have a soft, textured surface and reddish-brown soles.
description_view_0: Front view showing both boots standing upright, highlighting the smooth, unembellished shafts and rounded toes.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the gentle curve of the boots' shafts and the slightly protruding reddish-brown soles.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the open shafts and the interior lining, as well as the symmetry of the boots.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other side of the boots and the same reddish-brown sole detail.
